title: elliottia bracteata f. longiracemosa
intro: Elliottia bracteata f. longiracemosa is a plant species, also known as the long raceme Elliottia, belonging to the family Diapensiaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The plant is believed to offer various health benefits, such as reducing fever and relieving respiratory issues, due to its expectorant properties. Elliottia bracteata f. longiracemosa is traditionally prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture for its medicinal uses.
